docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF APPEARED. DEFENDANT APPEARED REMOTELY. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BOREK, BOGUSLAWA HEARING SET FOR APR-04-2024 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2024 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2023 - CONTINUED TO JAN-10-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 TO PROVIDE THE OUT-OF-STATE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR AT TRIAL. PLAINTIFF CHLOE CARPENTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOGUSLAWA BOREK IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. MATTER CONTINUED TO PROVIDE THE OUT-OF-STATE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR AT TRIAL. IF DEFENDANT WISHES TO APPEAR AT TRIAL REMOTELY, DEFENDANT MAY FILE THE REQUIRED FORMAL REQUEST TO SEEK AN ORDER GRANTING PERMISSION TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM. A COPY OF THE STANDARD REQUEST PACKET MAY BE FOUND ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SF.COURTS.CA.GOV/DIVISIONS/SMALL-CLAIMS . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED***
REMARK: DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-04-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF CHLOE CARPENTER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOGUSLAWA BOREK IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,900.00 FILED BY CARPENTER, CHLOE AS TO DEFENDANT BOREK, BOGUSLAWA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
